positive: A stunning, highly detailed celestial botanical pattern featuring stylized, bioluminescent flora intertwined with crescent moons and constellations. The central composition is a symmetrical, mandala-like arrangement, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and geometric structure. Style should be a fusion of Neo-Art Nouveau and modern Pop-Art illustration, rendered with crisp linework and vibrant, high-contrast jewel tones (deep sapphire blue, emerald green, rich gold, and matte black accents). The lighting must be dramatic and stylized, appearing as glowing luminescence emanating from the plants, ensuring all elements are legible and graphic. Highly suitable for apparel printing, isolated on a pure white or solid background.
negative: low resolution, grainy, blurry, text, signatures, logos, watermark, artifact, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, ugly, childish, cartoonish, grayscale, muted colors, soft focus
